properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're the same God today And the same God tomorrow Help me see the victory You already see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let my faith be today What it will be tomorrow When I've seen the victory You already see

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We need a miracle, You are the miracle maker God of the impossible, there is no power greater Exceeding, abundant, beyond what we could ask or think We call on Your Name, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: By the power of Your Name And all for Your glory The sick are healed, the soul is filled The battle has been won On Your promise I stand And in faith I believe it That what I pray in Your Name It's already done

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, let Your will be done, oh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In the Waiting you get the glory, In the Healing you get the glory, In the Breaking you get the glory, In the Healing you get the Glory,
